title: astragalus scaberrimus
intro: Astragalus scaberrimus, also known as the Rough-stemmed Milk-vetch or Astragalus, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as boosting the immune system, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus scaberrimus can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
